ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "sensor_version" TEXT /* Version of the sensor model */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor model was first produced */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the sensor model's specifications */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor model (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating condition */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor model */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter being measured (e.g., Operating Pressure Range) */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the parameter is measured (e.g., Prange, Pext) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "test_temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the operating conditions were tested */,
  "test_humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the operating conditions were tested */,
  "test_pressure" REAL /* Pressure at which the operating conditions were tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_conditions_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_conditions" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error condition */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor model */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter related to error (e.g., Total Error Band, Maximum Error with Supply Voltage) */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the error is measured (e.g., at 25°C, 700..1100 mbar) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the error */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the error */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the error */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "test_temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the error conditions were tested */,
  "test_humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the error conditions were tested */,
  "test_pressure" REAL /* Pressure at which the error conditions were tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_conditions_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "autozero_conditions" (
  "autozero_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each autozero condition */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor model */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter related to autozero (e.g., Total Error Band, autozero at one pressure point) */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the autozero is measured (e.g., at 25°C, 700..1100 mbar) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the autozero error */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the autozero error */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "test_temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the autozero conditions were tested */,
  "test_humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the autozero conditions were tested */,
  "test_pressure" REAL /* Pressure at which the autozero conditions were tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("autozero_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_autozero_conditions_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_voltage_conditions" (
  "voltage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply voltage condition */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor model */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter related to supply voltage (e.g., Maximum error with supply voltage) */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the supply voltage is measured (e.g., VDD = 1.8 V … 3.6 V) */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the supply voltage error */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "test_temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the supply voltage conditions were tested */,
  "test_humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the supply voltage conditions were tested */,
  "test_pressure" REAL /* Pressure at which the supply voltage conditions were tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voltage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_voltage_conditions_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor model */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "result_file" TEXT /* File path to the test result */,
  "test_temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the test */,
  "test_humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the test */,
  "test_pressure" REAL /* Pressure during the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_conducted_by" TEXT /* User who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality assurance, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sensor data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
